signalsmith-stretch.name: Signalsmith Stretch
signalsmith-stretch.unique_value: High-quality polyphonic pitch/time stretching with no GPL dependency

migration_notes.from:rubber-band: Signalsmith Stretch is MIT-licensed and header-only; API differs but covers similar use cases

signalsmith-dsp.name: Signalsmith DSP
signalsmith-dsp.description: Filters, envelopes, FFT, delay, spectral processing tools
signalsmith-dsp.unique_value: Comprehensive DSP toolkit with spectral processing and advanced envelope designs beyond Pulp built-ins

rtneural.name: RTNeural
rtneural.description: Real-time neural network inference optimized for audio
rtneural.unique_value: Real-time safe neural network inference for amp modeling, vocal processing, and intelligent audio effects

cycfi-q.name: Q (Cycfi)
cycfi-q.description: Pitch detection via bitstream autocorrelation and DSP primitives

Android.notes: Core libq works; q_io (audio I/O) requires PortAudio stub

iOS.notes: Core libq works; q_io (audio I/O) requires PortAudio stub

cycfi-q.unique_value: Fast, accurate pitch detection using bitstream autocorrelation — no equivalent in Pulp built-ins

libsamplerate.name: libsamplerate
libsamplerate.description: High-quality sample rate conversion (Secret Rabbit Code)
libsamplerate.unique_value: Industry-standard sample rate conversion with multiple quality modes (sinc best, sinc medium, sinc fastest, linear, zero-order-hold)

migration_notes.from:libsndfile: libsamplerate handles resampling only, not file I/O — use dr-libs for file decoding

dr-libs.name: dr_libs
dr-libs.description: Single-file WAV, FLAC, and MP3 decoding
dr-libs.unique_value: Zero-dependency single-header audio file decoding for WAV, FLAC, and MP3

migration_notes.from:libsndfile: dr_libs is MIT-0 and header-only but decode-only — no encode support for FLAC/MP3

pffft.name: PFFFT
pffft.description: SIMD-optimized FFT (SSE on x64, NEON on arm64)

Windows.notes: SSE on x64, NEON on arm64

Linux.notes: SSE on x64, NEON on arm64

pffft.unique_value: SIMD-optimized FFT significantly faster than general-purpose implementations for power-of-two sizes

migration_notes.from:fftw: PFFFT is BSD-licensed and lighter; covers real and complex FFT for power-of-two sizes

daisysp.name: DaisySP
daisysp.description: DSP library with oscillators, filters, effects, and physical modeling
daisysp.unique_value: Physical modeling synthesis (Karplus-Strong, modal, pluck) and drum synthesis not available in Pulp built-ins
alternatives: STK (MIT with patent caveats — more physical models)

fontaudio.name: fontaudio
fontaudio.description: Audio-specific icon font with 200+ icons for plugin UIs
fontaudio.unique_value: Purpose-built audio icon font — knob, fader, waveform, speaker, MIDI, and plugin format icons

r8brain-free-src.name: r8brain-free-src
r8brain-free-src.description: High-quality sample rate converter with low latency mode
r8brain-free-src.unique_value: Audiophile-grade sample rate conversion with configurable quality/latency tradeoffs
alternatives: libsamplerate (BSD-2 — industry standard, different quality profile)

migration_notes.from:libsamplerate: r8brain offers different quality/latency tradeoffs — benchmark both for your use case

essentia.name: Essentia
essentia.description: Comprehensive MIR library with 250+ audio analysis algorithms
essentia.unique_value: 250+ MIR algorithms including beat/onset detection, key detection, melody extraction, and audio classification
alternatives: Q (Cycfi, MIT) for pitch detection only
For mobile: use Q (Cycfi, MIT) for pitch detection + Aubio for beat/onset detection

rnnoise.name: RNNoise
rnnoise.description: Neural network noise suppression for voice
rnnoise.unique_value: Purpose-built neural noise suppression — removes keyboard, HVAC, crowd noise in real time
alternatives: SpeexDSP (BSD-3, traditional AEC/NS — less effective but lighter)

rubber-band.name: Rubber Band

Android.notes: Build without FFTW for minimal mobile build

iOS.notes: Build without FFTW for minimal mobile build

rubber-band.unique_value: Industry-standard time-stretching used in DAWs and production tools

fftw.name: FFTW
fftw.description: Fastest Fourier Transform in the West — highly optimized FFT
fftw.unique_value: Highly optimized FFT with auto-tuning SIMD code generation — fastest available for large transforms

aubio.name: Aubio
aubio.description: Audio labeling — pitch, onset, beat, and tempo detection

Android.notes: Build with minimal deps (no libsndfile, no FFTW)

iOS.notes: Build with minimal deps (no libsndfile, no FFTW)

aubio.unique_value: Lightweight, real-time pitch/onset/beat detection with minimal dependencies

libsndfile.name: libsndfile
libsndfile.description: Read and write audio files (WAV, AIFF, FLAC, OGG, and more)
libsndfile.unique_value: Full-featured audio file I/O supporting 20+ formats with read and write

miniaudio.name: miniaudio
miniaudio.description: Single-header audio playback, capture, and device I/O
miniaudio.unique_value: Complete audio device layer for mobile — Core Audio on iOS, AAudio on Android, single-header

oboe.name: Oboe
oboe.unique_value: Google-maintained Android audio with automatic AAudio/OpenSL selection for lowest latency

opus.name: Opus
opus.description: IETF standard low-latency audio codec (6-510 kbps)
opus.unique_value: The standard audio codec for streaming, VOIP, and WebRTC — patent-free, royalty-free

soundtouch.name: SoundTouch
soundtouch.description: Tempo, pitch, and playback rate adjustment
soundtouch.unique_value: Simple API for tempo/pitch/rate changes — widely used in media players

tinysoundfont.name: TinySoundFont
tinysoundfont.description: Single-header SoundFont2 synthesizer for MIDI playback
tinysoundfont.unique_value: MIT-licensed SF2 synthesis — mobile-friendly alternative to FluidSynth (LGPL)

fluidsynth.name: FluidSynth
fluidsynth.description: SoundFont 2 software synthesizer with MIDI support
fluidsynth.unique_value: Full SoundFont 2 synthesis engine — load .sf2 files for instrument playback
alternatives: For mobile: FluidLite (MIT) has no glib dependency and supports basic SF2 playback

kfr.name: KFR
kfr.description: Fast DSP framework with FFT, FIR/IIR, resampling, and SIMD

Android.notes: Pure C++ SIMD with NEON support

iOS.notes: Pure C++ SIMD with NEON support

kfr.unique_value: Comprehensive SIMD-optimized DSP with expression templates — faster than hand-written loops
alternatives: PFFFT (BSD-3) + Signalsmith DSP (MIT) for FFT + filters separately

kissfft.name: KissFFT
kissfft.description: Portable FFT for any size — not just power-of-two
kissfft.unique_value: Arbitrary-size FFT (not limited to power-of-two like PFFFT)

lame.name: LAME
lame.description: MP3 encoder — high-quality MP3 encoding for audio export

overlaps_with_builtin.note: dr_mp3 provides decode only. LAME adds encode capability.

lame.unique_value: The standard MP3 encoder. Required for MP3 export. LGPL — requires --accept-license.
lame.integration_guide: After pulp add lame --accept-license LGPL-2.0, the FormatRegistry automatically gains an Mp3Writer.

fdk-aac.name: FDK AAC
fdk-aac.description: AAC encoder/decoder — Fraunhofer FDK AAC codec for AAC audio export

overlaps_with_builtin.note: CoreAudioFormat provides macOS-only AAC read. FDK adds cross-platform encode+decode.

fdk-aac.unique_value: Cross-platform AAC encoder. FDK license has patent considerations — requires --accept-license.
fdk-aac.integration_guide: After pulp add fdk-aac --accept-license FDK-AAC, the FormatRegistry gains an AacWriter.

libflac.name: FLAC
libflac.description: FLAC encoder — lossless audio compression for high-quality export

overlaps_with_builtin.note: dr_flac provides decode only. libflac adds encode capability.

libflac.unique_value: Reference FLAC encoder — lossless, universally supported, BSD-3 licensed.
libflac.integration_guide: After pulp add libflac, the FormatRegistry gains a FlacWriter for .flac export.

alac.name: Apple ALAC
alac.description: Apple Lossless Audio Codec encoder — cross-platform ALAC write

overlaps_with_builtin.note: CoreAudioFormat provides macOS-only ALAC read. Apple ALAC adds cross-platform encode.

alac.unique_value: Apple's reference ALAC encoder, cross-platform. Apache 2.0 — no restrictions.
alac.integration_guide: After pulp add alac, the FormatRegistry gains an AlacWriter for .m4a export.
